creator: b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #5)

Hi Fernando,

No problems. I was just curious why. I freely admit, I'm no programmer and don't understand most of what is going on. Can't learn if you don't ask questions!

I didn't write the Makefile, it was inherited when I took over the port. I have changed the order of a few things that were suggested by portlint, the port handbook, or previous committers over the last year I've been the Maintainer, but no one had ever mentioned anything about the need to reorder these variables.

I will try to remember this when the next update comes up for multimedia/plexmediaserver, I'm sure that these variables are listed in the same incorrect order there as well.

Ben
